title: PlayerJoins
description: PlayerJoins plugin helps you set custom join messages for players that are configurable
body:
![plugin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c10623caebf1d09bf7115f62e553f7a8a87bba7a.png)
**_______________________________________________________________________________________________________________**
# **About Plugin**
Introducing the PlayerJoins plugin, designed for Minecraft servers running on versions 1.20 and compatible with Paper, Bukkit, and Spigot platforms. This lightweight and user-friendly plugin enhance your server experience by allowing server administrators to personalize player join messages effortlessly.

With PlayerJoins, administrators can easily tailor the welcome messages that greet players upon joining the server. Whether you want to add a touch of humor, display server rules, or simply create a unique atmosphere, this plugin provides the flexibility to customize join messages according to your server's theme and community preferences.

Installation is seamless – drop the plugin into your server's plugins folder, configure your desired join messages in the configuration file, and watch as players receive personalized welcomes upon entering your server. PlayerJoins enhances player engagement and sets the tone for a welcoming and distinctive server environment. Download PlayerJoins now to add a personalized touch to your server's join messages and create a memorable experience for your players.
**_______________________________________________________________________________________________________________**
